steps.title: Compare the two positions
steps.content: Text 1 says automated genre classification has not been very successful and may have reached a technological limit. Text 2 counters that a new image-based method solved a difficult classification problem, showing room for innovation.

steps.title: Reject unrelated responses
steps.content: Choice A discusses disagreement among people, which Text 2 does not emphasize. Choice B shifts to usefulness for listeners. Choice C invents criticism that previous research favored certain genres. The answer is D.
